summary: Wave 1: Async I/O conversion for config-loader, learning-engine, and model-manager to eliminate event loop blocking
details: Converted synchronous file operations to async across 3 critical packages. Config-loader now uses async I/O with caching layer, learning-engine implements async trackEvent with lazy loading, model-manager adds bounded arrays with FIFO eviction. Total risk reduction: 72 points (28+22+22). All 358 tests pass.

changes.description: Convert sync I/O to async with caching layer
changes.impact: Eliminates event loop blocking on config access (28 risk score reduction)

changes.description: Async trackEvent with lazy rollup loading, removed sync fs.readFileSync from constructor
changes.impact: Eliminates event loop blocking in hot path (22 risk score reduction)

changes.description: Add bounded arrays with FIFO eviction to metrics collector
changes.impact: Prevents unbounded memory growth (22 risk score reduction)

impact: High - eliminates event loop blocking in config access (1000+×/session), token tracking (1000+×/session), and event tracking (100-200×/session). Prevents unbounded memory growth in metrics collection.
